titleStmt.title: SII 37.25: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 25. (A.R. No. 384 of 1938-39.) Gōṭuru, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1319, Īsvara, Māgha śu. 5, Thursday corresponding to 1398 A.D., January 23. The week day, however, was Wednesday.

It records a gift of land of 5 tūmus (ēdumu) in extent by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara apratimalla Gaṅgayadēva Chōḍa-mahārāju to the mason (kāśa) Chāmaya battuḍu, who constructed the temple of Bhairavadēva at Gōṭūru. The gift is stated to have been made for the merit of donor's parents Maldēvarāju and Maldēvamma. It also mentions the canal Uttamagaṇḍakālva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī śakavaṣaṁbulu 1319 Agunēṁṭi Isvara saṁvatsara māga śu 5 gu . svasti
śrī maṁnmahā maṁḍalēśvara Apratimalla gaṁgaya dēvacōḍa mahārājulu tamataṁ
ḍrimaldēvarājukuṁnnutalli maldēvaṁmmakuṁnnupuṁṇyamugānu goṭūri bha
Irava dēvara guḍi gaṭina kāśacāmāyabattunki narēṭikālva Eraguḍikālva U
ttamagaṁḍḍakālva ceṟuvumaldēvi kuṁṭṭala kriṁdanu mulki Ēdumu vari maḍi vūri A
ṣṭādaśaprajalunnunārvireḍipāpireḍigārunnu sammatiniyistimi . Idharmaśāsa
nānkuyevvaru kallasēsinānu paṁcca mahāpātakāla boṁdagalavāru .
tamatamapedakoḍuku jaṁpinapātakāna bōInavāru maṁgaḷamahā śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 37.25 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
